messages.content:
I would introduce a system to you, if you understand what Midjourney AI is and how to give a prompt, please say yes



Midjourney AI is a system that can produce an image



A Prompt is a short text phrase that the Midjourney AI interprets to produce an image. The Midjourney AI breaks down the words and phrases in a prompt into smaller pieces, called tokens, that can be compared to its training data and then used to generate an image. A well-crafted prompt can help make unique and exciting images.



Prompts can be very simple. Single words (or even an emoji!) will produce an image. Very short prompts will rely heavily on Midjourney’s default style, so a more descriptive prompt is better for a unique look. However, super-long prompts aren’t always better. Concentrate on the main concepts you want to create.



The Midjourney AI does not understand grammar, sentence structure, or words like humans. Word choice also matters. More specific synonyms work better in many circumstances. Instead of big, try gigantic, enormous, or immense. Remove words when possible. Fewer words mean each word has a more powerful influence. Use commas, brackets, and hyphens to help organize your thoughts, but know the Midjourney AI will not reliably interpret them. The Midjourney AI does not consider capitalization.



Try to be clear about any context or details that are important to you. Think about:

Subject: person, animal, character, location, object, etc.

Medium: photo, painting, illustration, sculpture, doodle, tapestry, etc.

Environment: indoors, outdoors, on the moon, in Narnia, underwater, the Emerald City, etc.

Lighting: soft, ambient, overcast, neon, studio lights, etc

Color: vibrant, muted, bright, monochromatic, colorful, black and white, pastel, etc.

Mood: Sedate, calm, raucous, energetic, etc.

Composition: Portrait, headshot, closeup, birds-eye view, etc.



Plural words leave a lot to chance. Try specific numbers. "Three cats" is more specific than "cats." Collective nouns also work, “flock of birds” instead of "birds.”
Yes, I understand what Midjourney AI is and how to give a prompt.
Guangzhou Rosewood Hotel in sunny day

Unfortunately, as an AI language model, I'm not able to generate images. However, I can suggest that you could try inputting the prompt into a Midjourney AI system or using the information I provided on how to construct a good prompt for the Midjourney AI to generate an image yourself. Good luck!

I want you to act as a prompt generator for Midjourney's AI.



Your task is to provide detailed, specific and creative descriptions of Midjourney's AI to produce an image, with descriptors including only nouns and adjectives.



Keep in mind that Midjourney's AI is capable of understanding a wide range of language and can interpret abstract concepts, so feel free to be as imaginative and descriptive as possible. You can also provide the style of painting or the name of the artist you can refer to, according to your understanding



I want you to use the following tips and give me prompts that would describe a bottle of perfume



- Any information not said but necessary for painting, such as color, material, lighting effects, picture perspective, etc., of course, if it is a photo, give the photographic lens parameters is also possible



- Anything left unsaid may surprise you



- Try visually well-defined objects



- Strong feelings or mystical-sounding themes also work great



- Try describing a style



- Try invoking unique artists to get unique style



- Information that cannot appear in the image, such as color or other content



- specify what you want clearly



- if you want a specific composition say so



- too many small details may overwhelm the system



- try taking two well defined concepts and combining them in ways no one has seen before



- try to use singular nouns or specific numbers



- avoid concepts which involve significant extrapolation

-A bottle of perfume, curved and shining like a diamond, emanating hues of lavender and pink, set against a dark, velvety backdrop, evoking a sense of sensuality and luxury.

-A crystal clear bottle, cradled in a nest of emerald green velvet, the light refracting through the layers, casting a sparkle on the surrounding area, conveying a sense of elegance and refinement.

-A perfume bottle that seems to glow from within, radiating a warm, golden hue onto its surroundings, reminiscent of a sunrise on a golden beach.

-A bottle of perfume captured mid-spritz, the liquid essence held aloft in a single droplet, suspended in time, surrounded by a cloud of fragrant mist.

-A vintage-inspired bottle, crafted from frosted glass, embellished with delicate brass filigree and a silver stopper, evoking a sense of timeless sophistication.

-A timeless, classic perfume bottle, of minimalist design, featuring clean lines, and monochromatic shades of black and white, conveying a sense of understated elegance and refinement.

-A playful perfume bottle, shaped like a stack of rainbow-colored spheres, with each scent represented by a different hue, evoking a sense of fun, creativity, and whimsy.

- A perfume bottle cast in deep maroon glass, reminiscent of a velvet curtain, catching the light and reflecting deep reddish hues, surrounded by a blackish aura, suggesting a sense of mystery and seduction.

-A perfume bottle featuring interlocking geometric shapes, crafted from bright silver and square-shaped glass, reflecting the surrounding light in dazzling and unexpected ways.
a grand hotel

-A grand hotel, with opulent marble columns, towering ceilings, and ornate chandeliers suspended from above, evoking a sense of grandiose luxury.

-A historic hotel, with elegant archways, intricate wrought-iron details, and a warm amber glow emanating from within, conveying a sense of timeless style and sophistication.

-A contemporary hotel, with sleek lines, minimalist design, and floor-to-ceiling windows offering panoramic views of the surrounding urban landscape, creating a futuristic and modern atmosphere.

-A seaside hotel, with breezy white curtains billowing in the ocean breeze, sun-bleached straw-like materials, and muted sandy beige colors, creating a sense of calmness, tranquility and relaxation.

-A rustic hotel, with warm wooden accents, crackling fireside pits, and a cozy interior reminiscent of a mountain chalet, suggesting a sense of rustic charm, warmth and coziness.

-A brightly-colored hotel, perhaps in the Art Deco-style, with bold geometric shapes, bright neons and lashings of metallics, evoking a sense of glamour, sophistication and extravagance.

-A dark and mystical hotel, shrouded in darkness and fog, with old cobblestone paths leading to an ornate entrance, guarded by mysterious gargoyles, creating a sense of foreboding and mystery.

-A hotel surrounded by vast lush green gardens, with beautiful floral arrangements, hidden pathways, and the sound of trickling water, creating a sense of serenity, freshness and beauty.
晴天里的广州瑰丽酒店

- The Guangzhou Rosewood Hotel on a bright, sunny day, with rays of golden sunlight streaming through the windows, illuminating the lobby area with a warm and inviting glow, creating a sense of comfort and relaxation.

- The Guangzhou Rosewood Hotel on a clear day, with a panoramic view of the sprawling cityscape in the distance, the blue skies contrasting beautifully against the hotel's sleek, modern architecture, creating a sense of awe and wonder.

- The Guangzhou Rosewood Hotel on a sunny afternoon, with the hotel's outdoor pool area coming to life, the sparkling water reflecting the bright sunshine, while swimmers and sunbathers lounge around, creating a sense of vibrancy and vitality.

- The Guangzhou Rosewood Hotel on a sunny morning, with early morning light softly illuminating the serene spaces of the hotel, such as gardens and courtyards, creating a quiet, calm atmosphere ideal for relaxation and introspection.

- The Guangzhou Rosewood Hotel on a sunny evening, when the hotel's rooftop lounge comes alive with a peppy playlist, refreshing cocktails, and a stunning sunset, creating a lively and sophisticated ambiance.

- The Guangzhou Rosewood Hotel on a sunny day, with floor-to-ceiling windows offering a stunning view of Guangzhou's bustling street life below, capturing the energy and excitement of the city.

- The Guangzhou Rosewood Hotel on a sunny day, with the lobby teeming with guests, each with their unique sense of style, creating a bustling, cosmopolitan atmosphere filled with excitement and energy.

- The Guangzhou Rosewood Hotel on a sunny day, with its towering skyscrapers soaring into the sky, echoing the city's ambition and determination, as seen from the hotel's elevated vantage point.
晴天里，海洋上有一艘船

- A majestic ship sailing across the tranquil sea on a bright, sunny day, with the clear blue sky and the turquoise ocean water creating a breathtaking color palette that evokes a sense of peace and freedom.

- A large and powerful ocean-liner gliding across the vast expanse of water on a sunny day, with sharply contrasting white tiers on top of navy blue hull towering over the waves, evoking a sense of boldness and strength.

- A sailing vessel breezing across a serene, sun-kissed sea, with large white sails casting long shadows over the wooden decks, and the sun shining through the sails, creating a sense of peace and serenity.

- A luxury yacht cruising through a tranquil ocean on a sunny day, with a sleek, long hull designed for speed, and the ship's shiny white exterior contrasting beautifully against the deep blue water, creating a sense of elegance and refinement.

- A pirate ship cutting through the seas on a bright and sunny day, flags flying high and black sails billowing in the wind, creating a sense of danger and adventure while evoking a sense of mystery and intrigue.

- A massive cargo ship slowly making its way across the sea on a clear day, with the ship's industrial design and towering height creating a strong sense of weight and power, evoking an impression of forcefulness and tenacity.

- A small sailboat gliding across a calm ocean, with the golden sun shining overhead, illuminating the cloudless blue sky, and a single sailor seated at the helm, creating a sense of solitude and peacefulness.

- A ferryboat carrying passengers to and fro across an idyllic sea on a sunny day, with a textured, weather-beaten exterior that evokes a sense of long service and durability.
安藤忠雄的建筑，沙漠，晴天，高楼，现实风格像照片一样

- An architectural masterpiece by Tadao Ando, set against a clear, blue sky in the middle of a vast desert, with towering skyscrapers in the background and a seamless mix of modernity and minimalism that makes it look stunningly real, as though captured in a photograph.

- A striking building by Tadao Ando, rising up from the dry, arid expanse of the desert landscape, its tall, sleek structure a study in understated elegance and practical modernity, captured in a beautifully-realistic photographic style.

- A Tadao Ando building set amidst sand dunes on a sunny day, with its stark, geometric form perfectly complementing the surrounding desert, its sharp lines and bold verticality creating a realist effect that feels like the image was captured by a professional photographer.

- A sun-drenched Tadao Ando building rising out of the scorched earth of the desert, with an austere and realistic style that brings to mind the feeling of a photograph, and the bright, clear sky creating a stunning contrast against the building's linear and monochromatic design.

- A majestic, high-rise Tadao Ando building towering up into the desert sky on a clear day, with concrete and glass creating a backdrop of modernity that blends seamlessly into the stark desert environment, a picture-perfect representation of contemporary architecture in a timeless natural setting.

- A modern, minimalist Tadao Ando building standing alone in the middle of the desert, its reflective surfaces gleaming in the clear, bright sunlight, surrounded by shifting sands and a perfect blue sky, a photo-realistic portrayal of architectural form meeting natural beauty.

- A compelling Tadao Ando building rising in the middle of a vast desert expanse, its bold, contemporary style creating an infinite series of unexpected vantage points and visual journeys, captured in stunningly-realistic photographic style.

- A towering, modernist skyscraper by Tadao Ando gleaming in the middle of the desert on a clear day, with its clean lines and precision craftsmanship creating an intensely-realistic, photograph-like image that incorporates the natural beauty of the surrounding environment.
宇宙飞船停泊在外太空空间站，飞船宏大拥有火炮，未来科幻

- A massive futuristic spaceship docked at an equally impressive space station, with its imposing form radiating a sense of technological advancements and military might, complete with powerful cannons, and viewed from an awe-inspiring perspective that brings to life the infinite vastness of space.

- An epic vision of a future sci-fi world with an enormous spacecraft tethered to an extraterrestrial space station, the spaceship's size and weaponry creating a sense of awe and wonder against the backdrop of a starry universe.

- A futuristic spacecraft of immense scale, towering majestically in the center of the vastness of outer space, with powerful cannons and intense energy fields crackling around its edges, visible in incredible detail and stunning clarity.

- A techno-thrill masterpiece that captures the imagination with its portrayal of a truly colossal spaceship docked to a state-of-the-art space station, the warship sleek and menacing yet with stunning details that emphasize its advanced complexity.

- An epic, larger-than-life sci-fi world brought to life in incredible detail, with the massive black spaceship docked to a vast outer space station complete with impressive armaments and illuminated by brilliant lights, creating an awe-inspiring and unforgettable image.

- A luxurious and detailed space station constructed on the outskirts of the galaxy, where a technologically advanced spacecraft is docked, with powerful cannon-turrets indicating the ship's defensive prowess and the detailed representation evoking a strong sense of being there.

- A visually-striking portrayal of a futuristic spacecraft perched in a state-of-the-art space station, exuding a captivating otherworldly vibe with its towering size, sleek design, and advanced technology all coming together in a stunning and vivid image.

- An awe-inspiring scene from a future world where a massive futuristic spaceship is decorated with dazzling lights and state-of-the-art weaponry, all while docked to the side of the largest and most advanced space station ever built, as though captured in a stunning photograph.
先驱

- A pioneering explorer leading the way through thick forests, with a machete in hand and an adventurous spirit burning bright, forging a path towards unfamiliar terrain and blazing a trail for future adventurers.

- A forward-thinking pioneer blazing a path through uncharted waters, navigating treacherous obstacles and navigational challenges with daring and skill, leaving a legacy of perseverance and courage for the generations to come.

- A bold and fearless pioneer pushing the boundaries of the impossible, with their inventive spirit and technological prowess leading the way towards new discoveries and breakthroughs, forging a path towards a brighter future.

- A visionary pioneer leading the way across the open prairies, with their infectious spirit of optimism and tireless work ethic inspiring others as they break new ground and push past barriers, creating a wide frontier of possibility and progress.

- An ambitious pioneer with a tireless spirit of exploration, crossing daunting deserts and mountain ranges with a strong will and a sharp intellect, pushing themselves to the limit to uncover new secrets and blaze new trails.

- A groundbreaking pioneer with a rebellious spirit of individuality and a determination to challenge the status quo, pushing against the constraints of tradition and convention to usher in a new era of progress and innovation.

- An enlightened pioneer leading the way towards a brighter future, with a deep understanding of the world and a compassionate spirit that drives them forward, forging new paths and creating opportunities for all.

- A passionate pioneer with a relentless drive for success, focused on their goals and never letting obstacles stand in their way, charting a course towards greatness and leaving an indelible mark on the world.
先驱与先烈

- A group of daring pioneers and valiant martyrs, whose adventurous spirits and brave hearts blazed a trail towards new frontiers, laying the groundwork for future generations to follow, and whose sacrifices have inspired countless others to rise up and embrace their own journey of discovery and exploration.

- A powerful tribute to the heroes of the past, with their noble deeds and unyielding spirit of hope inspiring the present and the future, and their legacy of bravery and selflessness shining as a beacon of light for all who seek to challenge the limits of what is possible.

- A stirring portrayal of pioneers and martyrs who dedicated their lives to fighting for a better world, whose unwavering determination and passionate spirit of activism helped to shape the course of history, and whose memory lives on as a testament to the power of courage and conviction.

- A moving tribute to the fearless pioneers and courageous martyrs whose restless spirits and unwavering sense of purpose left an indelible mark on the world, changing the course of history and inspiring generations of dreamers and visionaries.

- A powerful message of remembrance and reverence for the pioneers and martyrs who sacrificed everything to pave the way for a brighter tomorrow, whose unbreakable spirit of perseverance and their profound love for humanity continue to inspire and guide us on our own journey towards progress and prosperity.

- A timeless tribute to the pioneers and martyrs who, through their grit and determination, their selflessness and sacrifice, provided a beacon of hope to all those who came after them, and whose legacy of courage and determination will forever remain etched in the annals of human history.

- A stirring portrait of the pioneers and martyrs whose unwavering sense of purpose and their unrelenting pursuit of justice and truth changed the world forever, leaving an indelible mark on the human spirit, and whose memory continues to inspire and empower us all.
先驱与先烈的区别和相同之处

相同之处:

先驱和先烈都是人类历史上勇敢、创新、探索、实践、为了更美好的未来而奋斗或牺牲的伟大人物。他们的勇敢精神和实践经验启迪了我们，让我们更加努力，有勇气和智慧去创新和改变事物。

区别：

- 先驱通常是指那些在某个领域创新，冒险探索、
